name: WebCode Sonification Engine
description: Open-source Chrome MV3 extension transforming webpage computational structure (DOM, sampled CSS, geometry) into deterministic generative music via Web Audio synthesis. Local-only analysis.
claim: A webpage's accessible computational structure may define a reproducible generative musical identity.

prior_art.title: Synesthesia Add-on: a Tool for HTML Sonification
prior_art.acknowledgment: Special thanks to the author. WSE was designed independently and is not an equivalent system, but this pioneer work established the feasibility of the direction.

determinism.guarantee: same page structure + same options => identical score

playback_modes.scroll: the page's scroll position drives the timeline (§45)
playback_modes.live: the page's DOM mutations drive a live performance over a looping ambient bed (§29-31)

export.wav: offline render through the live-playback synthesis graph, client-side, 16-bit PCM
